title: Finish the all-domain flip (tasks/notes/driver_profile) + currency-filtered breakdown
status: ready-to-merge (kill-switched; awaiting Muhammad's OK to push main)

job1.what: Flip the LAST keyword-only CRUD lanes (tasks, notes, driver_profile) onto the capability registry — completing the all-domain routing rebuild started in B-155..B-158.
job1.how: resolveDomainRoute (behind M8_REGISTRY_CRUD, default OFF) now carries a CLEAR (non-ambiguous) registry winner in {tasks, notes, driver_profile} as `crud` — WITHOUT replacing `arb` (unlike wallet/fleet/finance). capabilityFallback(message, arb, crud) consumes it as a RESCUE: it only fires AFTER every deterministic keyword parser already missed, the registry winner BROADENS the noun match (catches 'remind me'/'fyi'/'set X's salary' the narrow _CAP_* regexes miss), and for tasks/notes the ACTION-signal requirement STAYS so a no-action chat turn is never stolen. driver_profile gets a brand-new help card (its STRONG signal already implies the action). No change to capability-registry.js or domain-arbiter.js — classifyAll already returns these domains.
job1.no_turn_stolen: Keyword parsers run FIRST and win; rescue requires (tasks/notes) an action verb; ambiguous/contest -> crud stays null -> pre-159 behaviour.
job1.telemetry: Rescued turns log reason `registry_crud_rescue` with the correct lane (incl. driver_profile) via the new `lane` field on the capabilityFallback reply.

job2.what: Currency-filtered breakdown — 'breakdown on 921 sar' returned a SAR+EGP mix; must be SAR-only.
job2.how: Added parseBreakdownCurrencyFilter() (a number immediately followed by a currency token => filter to THAT currency; distinct from parseCurrencyConvert's 'in <cur>' CONVERSION). getCategoryBreakdown() gained an optional 4th arg `currencyFilter` that drops other-currency rows at the source. Always on (no flag).
job2.privacy: Rate/format only; no figure leaves M8. Only scopes which rows are summed.

files_not_touched: lib/domain-arbiter.js (classifyAll already returns tasks/notes/driver_profile — no change needed)
lib/capability-registry.js (signals already exist — refined nothing, duplicated nothing)

kill_switches.M8_REGISTRY_CRUD: JOB 1 (and the B-157 wallet/fleet/finance flip). Default OFF = byte-for-byte pre-159. Remove / set =0 to revert.
kill_switches.job2_revert: JOB 2 has no flag; revert = remove parseBreakdownCurrencyFilter + the currencyFilter arg.

tests.regression: build152 (36/0), build153 (28/0), build155 (0 money mis-routes), build156 (gates A/B/C all 0), build157 (43/0), build159 (48/0) — 6/6 GREEN
tests.node: Node ABSENT on host -> all tests are PS-5.1 mirrors of the JS routing/aggregation decisions (same boundary as build157).
tests.ps_mirror_note: One mirror bug found+fixed during dev (PS case-insensitive var $CF aliasing the $cf param disabled the filter) — JS is correct (distinct case-sensitive names); fixed the mirror, not the JS.

live_test: tests/BUILD159_LIVE_TEST.md — JOB 2 works on deploy (no flag); JOB 1 needs M8_REGISTRY_CRUD=1.
vercel_fn_cap: No new api/*.js (12-fn cap stays full).
rollback: Vercel env: remove M8_REGISTRY_CRUD (JOB 1 off). Git: revert this branch's commit.
notes: Sequential central-file build: verified no other live orchestrator.js session and no uncommitted orchestrator.js edits in sibling worktrees before starting. Isolated worktree at ../../M8-b159.
